sections.paragraph: (i.q. עַוָּה “overturning,” unless indeed it should be so read), 2Ki 18:34 19:13 Isa 37:13 and עַוָּא 2Ki 17:24 [Iva], pr.n. of a city under the dominion of the Assyrians, from which colonies were brought to Samaria. Gent. noun, pl. עַוִּים 2Ki 17:31 but see as to other nations of the same name below under עַוִּי. Some compare with this Avatha, a city of Phœnicia (see Relandi Palæstina, p. 232, 233).
